response.justification: Senior backend engineer with 20 years of experience and recent fintech/AI exposure at Stripe, but lacks demonstrated production multi-agent AI architecture experience, clear team scaling leadership track record, and regulatory compliance depth required for this CTO role. Resume credibility issues with overlapping employment dates further reduce confidence.
strengths: 20-year engineering trajectory with multiple senior/staff roles at high-caliber companies (Stripe, Shopify, National Instruments)
Strong distributed-systems background: high-performance microservices, real-time systems, millions of RPS at scale
Current exposure to AI infrastructure at Stripe including agentic frameworks and MCP code generation
concerns: No clear evidence of architecting or operating production multi-agent AI systems; Stripe mention of 'agentic workflows' is vague and may be tooling-focused rather than core design
Resume lists overlapping employment dates and multiple concurrent roles (e.g., 'Founder, Datadog' marked SEPTEMBER 2016 — PRESENT while holding full-time roles), raising credibility questions
No demonstrated track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people; missing evidence of technical leadership at organizational scale required for CTO role

key_factors.factor: Fintech infrastructure and regulatory AI experience
